response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of broad full-stack engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and high-throughput data systems (Sociomantic millions of req/s), with solid TDD/CI/CD craftsmanship and some pricing-optimization work at Optilyz. However, the resume shows no direct experience building experimentation platforms, feature-flighting systems, telemetry foundations, or statistical/bias-detection work — the core of this Principal Growth role. Title trajectory is Senior/Staff rather than Principal/IC6 with cross-org platform ownership, and there is no evidence of leading multi-workstream initiatives across teams and products at enterprise scale.
strengths: Deep polyglot engineering background (TypeScript, Node, C/C++, Java, DLang) matching listed languages
Proven low-latency, high-scale service experience at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby handling millions of req/s
Strong software-craftsmanship discipline: TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, plus teaching/mentoring track record
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation frameworks, A/B testing, feature flagging, or rollout/risk controls
Lacks evidence of Principal-level cross-team platform leadership or stakeholder alignment at IC6 scope
Limited data-science/statistical analysis and bias-detection experience required for measurement-quality work

key_factors.factor: Seniority/scope gap vs. Principal IC6 cross-org leadership
Strong polyglot engineering fundamentals and scale experience
